Bash(cd /c/Users/segev/sdvesdaW/trading/backend && python -c "
import yfinance as yf, time
t = time.time\(\)
syms = 'BTC-USD,ETH-USD,AAPL,TSLA,SPY,QQQ,NVDA'
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
def fetch\(sym\):
    fi = yf.Ticker\(sym\).fast_info
    return sym, getattr\(fi,'last_price',None\), getattr\(fi,'previous_close',None\)
with ThreadPoolExecutor\(max_workers=7\) as ex:
    results = list\(ex.map\(fetch, syms.split\(','\)\)\)
for r in results: print\(r\)
print\('elapsed', round\(time.time\(\)-t,2\),'s'\)
" 2>&1)
